product_overview: A public information portal for Gampong Munye Pirak with a protected admin panel for internal content management. It provides visitors access to profile, news, gallery and a contact form while admins manage site content via a dashboard.
core_goals: Allow public visitors to read village profile pages (overview, vision & mission, organization structure).
Provide a browsable news listing and gallery for public consumption.
Enable the public to submit contact messages that are stored by the system.
Allow authorized internal users to log in and access an admin dashboard to manage content.
Protect admin routes so only authenticated admin users can access management interfaces.

features.name: Public Content Browsing
features.description: Visitors can navigate the site to read profile information, browse news listings, and view gallery items.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Navigate to /profil -> Read profile overview
Navigate to / -> Navigate to /profil/visi-misi -> Read vision and mission
Navigate to / -> Navigate to /profil/struktur-organisasi -> Read organization structure
Navigate to / -> Navigate to /berita -> Select an article from the list -> Read article detail
Navigate to / -> Navigate to /galeri -> Select a gallery item from the list -> View gallery item detail

features.name: Contact Message Submission
features.description: Public users submit messages via the contact page; the system validates input and returns success or validation feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Navigate to /kontak -> Fill required contact fields -> Submit contact form -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /kontak -> Submit contact form with missing required fields -> See validation feedback and field-level errors

features.name: Authentication and Admin Access
features.description: Authorized internal users sign in and access the protected admin dashboard; they can also log out of the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username or email and password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> See admin dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill username or email and incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See authentication failure message
Assuming authenticated user on /admin/dashboard -> Initiate logout -> See public home page

features.name: Public Content Browsing
features.description: Visitors browse profile, news, and gallery content.
user_interactions: Open homepage and navigate via top menu
Open profile pages and read village information
Open news list and open article detail
Open gallery list and open item detail

features.name: Contact Message Submission
features.description: Public user sends message through contact form.

features.name: Authentication and Admin Access
features.description: Internal user authenticates and accesses admin dashboard.
user_interactions: Fill username or email and password

known_limitations.issue: Automated tests requiring credentials will be blocked without valid admin account.
known_limitations.impact: Admin route scenarios cannot be fully validated.
